applicability_reason: applicable: 030 corpus marks F5 with the same executor reachability as F3.
output_summary: copilot --version failed with SecItemCopyMatching -50, so real cli-copilot cells were not dispatched.
fail_open_behavior: cell recorded explicit non-pass status and continued aggregation
manual_fallback: Repair Copilot keychain/auth, then rerun the cell with the same frozen manifest.
